candidates.why: Direct total revenue line and matches top-line revenue definition.
Also a valid top-line sales label; identical to reported total revenue in the preview.
Explicitly non-revenue, so not appropriate for REVT.

variables.notes: Priority list for revenue line changes over time; do not sum.

REVIEWED. No COGS candidate was provided. 'Raw materials and consumables' is the closest direct production cost line, but true COGS may also involve inventory changes and capitalization adjustments (e.g., 'Change in inventories', 'capitalised'). Kept final_choice minimal per instruction.

candidates.why: Clear overhead component and valid SG&A item.
Clear overhead component and valid SG&A item.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present. Selected overhead component rows from the candidate list and excluded COGS and D&A lines.

candidates.why: This is amortization within R&D, not the core R&D expense itself, so not preferred when a direct R&D row exists.
Direct R&D expense label on the income statement; best match for XRD.
Balance sheet asset, not period R&D expense.
Balance sheet gross capitalized R&D-related asset, not income statement expense.
Accumulated amortization on BS, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet/intangible-related label, not clearly period expense.

variables.notes: Used direct income statement R&D line as priority item; do not sum with amortization or capitalized development balance sheet rows.

candidates.why: Broader finance-cost line; acceptable fallback if direct interest expense is unavailable.
Direct interest expense line; preferred for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Lease-interest subcomponent only, not full interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure, not preferred primary XINT line.
Balancing row should not be preferred over direct reported line.

variables.notes: Priority list only; later code should take the first non-missing value per year.

candidates.why: Balancing row, not preferred. Also risks being less precise than owner/parent equity.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Candidate list missed the proper owner-equity line. Income statement allocation of earnings to minority interests, not balance sheet minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income subtotal, not minority interest on the balance sheet.
